reviews.text: Yoo, this fits my Elgato Key Light perfectly.  The grid diffuses light to only me or my subject and not the full background.  Now my LED lights in the background look even better.  This is a quality product and I definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: I just installed a Elgato Key Light above my desk and it has proven to be very bright - this add-on takes the side glare off my monitor and out of my line of sight while still providing task light for my workstation while still providing enough light for my video conferences.

reviews.text: Great quality and craftsmanship! I love how it fits perfectly around the Arctis Nova pro wireless hub. It also has very strong magnets that work with my secret labs magnus desk. I love how it helps things within reach and keeps my desk clear. Genius!

reviews.text: Love it! Perfect fit, love that I don't need the L-Bracket which saves me from extending my desk from the wall, and fast shipping.

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.product: Stream Deck Mk.2 Wood Face Plate
reviews.text: Fit & finish on this is amazing - I have several models and the 15 button is always at my line of sight - this upgrade adds some much needed warmth to my workstation - would love to get one for the XL deck - that's my workhorse and it too needs a bit of an upgrade!

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Exceptional fit and makes my camera so much easier to use with the current boom arm!
